Tolan's Darkwood Boots  
 

Lore Item
Slot: FEET
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 18
Effect: Serpent Sight (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 7.0) at Level 45
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: RNG
Race: ALL except IKS VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Tolan's Darkwood Boots
Lore Item
Slot: FEET
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 18
Effect: Serpent Sight (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 7.0) at Level 45
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: RNG
Race: ALL except IKS VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):40, 20, 10
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:330 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:742
Submitted By:Arjantis Evayastar
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 08:55:54
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name
skeletal caretaker


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Karnor's Castle
Send a correction
Post Comment
Rarity Check
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2022 at 10:23 AM Rating: Decent
FireNightblade
Scholar
16 posts
I have been camping this mob for 5 days straight, the rarity on these boots must be insane. I have killed the caretaker receiving the vambraces 30+, Myrlokar's gift 10+ times, even the Berserker Club 3+ times but no boots. I need the boots to complete my set, craziness and no one is camping them but me. Any tips suggestions or rituals to perform in order to get these boots would be helpful.

Edited, Jan 22nd 2022 11:27am by FireNightblade
▲ Page top
Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2003 at 4:52 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592258988162
304 posts
As of todays patch, Tolan's Darkwood Boots now have a new effect:

Effect: Serpent Sight (Must Equip. Casting Time: 7.0)

Which is useless to all but the Human Rangers among us.

Edited, Fri Dec 19 05:05:39 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2003 at 9:17 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1627258797374
26 posts
Keep in mind that Invigor was also useless. Before the patch, I don't remember ever using these boots for the effect. But now that it has an infra effect, I plan to have it up all the time. In short, the change makes them more useful for human rangers, and won't affect the other rangers.

-Phude Bearteeth
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2004 at 12:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258988162
304 posts
Excellent point! They've taken something that probably very few used, and made it useful to at least one race/class combo. Shame they didn't make it Ultravision with See Invis, which would have increased it's shelf life considerably.
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2003 at 4:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757441222
9 posts
Ummmm..... In case you didn't know this serpent sight also gives see invis effect which helps a lot if you in a zone that have mobs that can invis like some of the higher areas.
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2003 at 4:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966228402
194 posts
Serpent Sight doesn't give See Invis; just Infravision. You might be thinking of Spirit Sight, which is a different spell.
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2004 at 12:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258988162
304 posts
Although our very handy Spell: Falcon Eye line of spells, starting at 52, has a see invis component, with the upgrade at level 58, Spell: Eagle Eye adding ultravision to our line of buffs.
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2004 at 12:33 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749845897
236 posts
Rangers get Eyes of the cat at around 19 or 24, so yes this frees me from switching out a spell every so often, but it's not like this gives us something we didn't already have... does it?
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2004 at 6:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594573680191
108 posts
none of the Kunark clicky at lvl 45 gives you anything you didn't have before. Look 'em up some time and notice that.
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2004 at 3:27 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591762559494
Scholar
29 posts
That seems to be true fer everythin; but the Breastplate, which I still covet! Ranger self-portin' to LFay. Gotta love that.
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2004 at 7:45 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592759021596
12 posts
Don't forget the bracer, I'm pretty sure, at least the last time I checked, Ranger can't summon arrows.
▲ Page top
RE: Change of effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2004 at 11:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258988162
304 posts
Both the BP and the bracer are awesome. The bracer will become redundant after you get the Endless Quiver AA, but still amazing until then.
▲ Page top
Effect worthless
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2002 at 11:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758632988
18 posts
Bought the boots before looking them up. Effect can be cast by clicking on the boots(at level 45 or over). You must stand still while casting--and the casting time is fairly long. The effect can not be used well while fighting. Basicly boots waste of money unless you just want the ac.

Edited, Wed Dec 4 10:56:46 2002
▲ Page top
What?
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2002 at 12:14 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781690001
16 posts
What's wrong with a Wurmy? Not trying to take away from the discussion of these boots, but all mid-level and higher players should already know to keep their stamina above 100. With such high stamina and a haste item, I think the Wurmslayer is a fine Ranger weapon.
▲ Page top
Be Aware...
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2002 at 9:03 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591774066779
Scholar
103 posts
Be aware of 1 thing before you buy these boots, fellow rangers, once you get over 100sta (which should be a goal for all rangers seeing as how we need every HP we can muster) the effect becomes useless. Despite how annoying seeing the yellow bar empty may be, it means NADA if your sta is 101 or higher, aka no slowed attack speed, no lost dex/agi. I personally am wearing Shrouded Boots from ME right now, the ac is 6 less, but PILE of stats I have to choose over these (12ac +4 to all stats, except cha which is +5). Also my sta is settled out at 104 now, so the effect would be useless. Just my input, If you are lacking in the sta area, and use heavy weapons (shudder... Wurmslayer) these may be the booties for you, but think about it before you blow PP on these when you could be saving for that Bracer =)

Wolveran Shadowbane 54.1 Pathfinder
Shizadow Knizight 34 Shadowknight

Just say no! To using a Wurmslayer that is...
▲ Page top
Effect level
QuoteReply
# May 11 2002 at 10:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775714490
3 posts
At what level can you use this effect?
